calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-29-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: David M. Fried, Esq. 248-3880 for petitioners & moving parties; Brian C. Pedersen, Esq. 482-9933 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling except takes off calendar the motion to tax arbitration fees of $2,912.50 (Court continues jurisdiction.) Petitioner to prepare order.

Petition To Confirm Arbitration
Off Calendar Jan-09-2002 Continued To Jan-29-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: David M. Fried, Esq. 248-3880 for petitioners & moving parties; Michael J. Flynn, Esq. 482-9933 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling. Re petitioners request for attorneys fees, the Court continues the matter to 01/29/02 for Mr. Flynn to file opposition by 01/18; any reply due 01/23. Mr. Fried to prepare orders.

Petition To Confirm Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-12-2001 Continued To Jan-09-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: David M. Fried, Esq. 248-3880 for petitioners & moving parties; Michael J. Flynn, Esq. 482-9933 for respondent & opposing party (both appearing via Courtcall).
RULING: Argued and the Court continues the matter to 01/09/02. (Mr. Fried to submit revised orders by 1/3.)

Petition To Confirm Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-07-2001 Continued To Dec-12-01 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: David M. Fried, Esq. 248-3880 for petitioners & moving parties; Steven A. Simontacchi, Esq. & Michael J. Flynn, Esq. 482-9933 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: The Court continues the matter to 12/12/01 (opposition was filed); petitioner may file reply today; parties may appear telephonically via Courtcall.
